svg.text: Send and receive paths during the Communication phase
First message is seq=1. Embedded in Metadata.
Sign(privateKey, Data) — covers only the inner
serialized Protobuf, not metadata or padding.
Random 24-byte nonce per message. Nonce prepended
If Poly1305 auth tag verification fails, decryption
returns error — tampered or corrupted ciphertext.
Uses peer's public key from Introduction phase.
Each layer independently detects: ciphertext tampering · message forgery · replay/reorder attacks
